verified_fixed_causes: flat parent-coordinate tokenization loses parent identity when different joints quantize to the same coordinate
DFS stack-close encodes exact parent identity without adding a new vocabulary entry
random sibling serialization removes the lexical sibling order as a unique target
GPU prefix perturbation reuses the existing 1024 FPS surface anchors and does not add CPU raycasting to the dataloader
verified_open_facts: the formal Westlake manifests contain 15903 train rows and 857 valid rows
stack-close round-trips all 16760 formal rows under canonical and two randomized sibling serializations with zero failures
train maximum stack-close target length is 1003 and valid maximum is 827
the isolated route modifies no flat UniRig baseline source file
the current route has 663383552 trainable parameters and the optimizer owns exactly all 663383552 with no duplicate or missing parameter
a 600-exposure 32-row diagnostic produced 32 of 32 legal EOS generations with zero hitmax and mean topology F1 0.590121
the remaining short-run failure mode is premature CLOSE and under-generation rather than coordinate looping or template collapse
condition refresh adds 3166464 parameters through zero-residual cross-attention at decoder layers 8, 16, and 24 without changing initial logits
the matched 600-exposure condition-refresh diagnostic produced 32 of 32 legal EOS generations, zero hitmax, mean topology F1 0.568839, and mean J2J 0.057209
condition refresh increased median full-trainer step time from 2.87990 seconds to 2.90510 seconds, about 0.9 percent
the matched short run does not show a condition-refresh quality improvement over the no-refresh route
unknowns: formal 80016-exposure stack-close validation performance and hitmax rate
formal 80016-exposure condition-refresh validation performance and hitmax rate
whether condition refresh improves robustness after full training despite no improvement in the matched 600-exposure diagnostic
next_required_result: Submit the two isolated 2xA100-80 full fine-tunes from the official static UniRig checkpoint: stack-close sibling-randomization plus 5-percent axial/radial prefix perturbation, and the matched route with zero-residual condition refresh.
